label: Catalog Product Photo
description: Operational packshot template for supermarket, retail catalog, and ecommerce product photography.

required.name: productName
required.description: Exact retail product name or plain product description

required.name: category
required.description: Top-level product category such as Beverage or Fresh Produce

required.name: productType
required.description: Specific product type such as Fruit or Soft Drink

optional.name: packaging
optional.description: Packaging type such as Bag, Aluminum Can, Plastic Jug

optional.name: primaryColor
optional.description: Main visible product or packaging color

optional.name: assetQuery
optional.description: Optional asset-search query override for asset-only mode

optional.name: openverseId
optional.description: Optional exact Openverse image id to pin a known asset in asset-only mode

fragments.subject: one product only: {{productName}}, category {{category}}, type {{productType}}, brand {{brand}}, packaging {{packaging}}
fragments.style: commercial retail photography, supermarket catalog style, ecommerce ready, photorealistic, highly consistent across a large product set
fragments.composition: centered single product, occupies about 75 percent of frame, around 10 percent safe margin, 1:1 square composition, {{cameraAngle}}
fragments.lighting: soft studio lighting, 5500K daylight white balance, minimal natural shadow
fragments.color: accurate product color reproduction, natural appearance, primary color emphasis on {{primaryColor}}, sRGB delivery, no HDR, no artistic filter, no oversaturation
additional: show the actual retail product customers would purchase
packaging must match the product category
constraints: consistent packshot quality across many SKUs

notes: Asset-only mode depends on what open-license source material exists and works best for generic or commodity products.

constraints: prefer simple, clean packshot geometry over dramatic styling
strong packaging fidelity and consistent shelf-ready presentation
highest material realism and packaging fidelity suitable for industrial-scale catalog production

notes: For exact branded packaging, asset-only mode can only adapt assets that already exist in open-license libraries.
